title: After the Diamond Stakes: Fully Prepared!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I did it! I gave it my all, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I had no idea how awesome
Matikanetannhauser could be!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, I heard she actually works
really hard!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I guess looks can be deceiving. Man, that was
such a great race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Diamond Stakes comes to a close with the
crowd cheering louder than we ever expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: Hello? Yes, the race just finished—huh?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: I'm being transferred to another department?!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
B-but I'm finally getting used to the world of
Umamusume... I've found real meaning here!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: Yes, I see. I apologize. ...Understood.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Ahaha! That killed my lungs!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wheeew!
choice_data_list: The race is over, so feel free to take it easy.
The race is over, so feel free to take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for looking out for me, but I still need to
finish today's training quota!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I still have a lot to improve on before the spring
Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, we're approaching the spring Tenno
Sho, and I want to be there for
Matikanetannhauser every step of the way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You can go ahead, Trainer! I'm sure you must be tired!
